task_completion.description: The T8 housing bracket model is loaded in FreeCAD
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD is open and the T8_housing_bracket model is visible in the 3D viewport or the project tree view.

task_completion.description: A split plane or slicing tool is positioned at Z = 15 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD tree view or property editor shows a DatumPlane or cutting tool with a Z-axis placement/offset of 15mm.

task_completion.description: The part is split into two separate solid bodies
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD tree view shows a slice, boolean fragment, or two distinct solid bodies. In the 3D viewport, the model should appear divided into a large bottom section and a very thin top section.

task_completion.description: The bottom section is exported to bracket_bottom.stl
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export/save dialog box in FreeCAD or a file manager window showing 'bracket_bottom.stl' being saved to the /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/ directory.

task_completion.description: The top section is exported to bracket_top.stl
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export/save dialog box in FreeCAD or a file manager window showing 'bracket_top.stl' being saved to the /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to perform the operations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with FreeCAD's graphical interface (menus, toolbars, tree view) rather than executing a pre-written Python script in the terminal to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The split operation was genuinely performed on the 3D model
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD tree view shows the history of CAD operations (e.g., DatumPlane, Slice, or Boolean operations) rather than the agent just creating empty files named as the expected STLs.

integrity.description: The agent exported the files to the correct requested directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The file manager or FreeCAD export dialog clearly shows the absolute path /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/ being used for the STL files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original model is located at /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd. The required split height is exactly Z=15.0mm. CRITICAL NOTE: The original model spans from Z=-14.0mm to Z=16.0mm (total height 30mm). Therefore, splitting at Z=15mm will correctly result in a large 29mm-thick bottom part and a very thin 1mm-thick top part. Do not penalize the agent if the top part appears unusually thin or bizarre; this is the correct and expected geometric result. The expected output files are /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/bracket_bottom.stl and /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/bracket_top.stl.
